query:
SELECT id, user_id, execution_type, status, started_at, finished_at, items_scraped, new_items, error_message 
FROM scrapingLogs 
ORDER BY started_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute SELECT id, user_id, execution_type, status, started_at, finished_at, items_scraped, new_items, error_message 
FROM scrapingLogs 
ORDER BY started_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
